body:
The benefit to which an individual described in regulation 7, 7A or 7B is entitled is a payment to the value of £5.60 (“the basic rate”) for each week that individual is so entitled.
The benefit to which a child described in regulation 8(1)(a) or 8(1)(b) is entitled is payment for Best Start Foods to the value of—
double the basic rate for each week that the child is so entitled until the child has reached the age of one year, or has reached the first anniversary of their estimated date of delivery, whichever occurs later,
the basic rate for each week thereafter that the child is so entitled until the child has reached the age of 3 years.
A child, as described in regulation 8, is entitled to the full amount of payment for the week in which they reach the age of 3 years.
heading: Regulation 13
